gaps.reason: No blocks were mined for roughly six days immediately after the genesis block (2009-01-03) -- a genuine historical fact about early Bitcoin, spot-checked against block-explorer data during Phase 5 (2026-07-09, see PROGRESS.md), not a data-source or pipeline defect.

Verified 2026-07-09 by calling BlockchainInfoChartsClient().fetch_chart('hash-rate') live: blockchain.info's own hash-rate chart is itself missing 2025-11-13 through 2025-11-15 -- a gap in the upstream source, not a defect in our backfill or pipeline.

Verified 2026-07-09 by calling AlternativeMeFngClient().fetch_full_history() live: alternative.me's own Fear & Greed index is itself missing 2018-04-14 through 2018-04-16 -- a gap in the upstream source, not a defect in our backfill or pipeline.

Verified 2026-07-09 by calling AlternativeMeFngClient().fetch_full_history() live: alternative.me's own Fear & Greed index is itself missing 2024-10-26 -- a gap in the upstream source, not a defect in our backfill or pipeline.
